case_title: MAURICE PARKS VS. MARIA ORTEGA et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS MARIA ORTEGA AND FARMER INSURANCE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY PARKS, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, MARIA (DRIVER)) FARMERS INSURANCE ALBANO, ROMEO (OWNER) MANOA, SULIANA (OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKS, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, MARIA (DRIVER))
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKS, MAURICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORTEGA, MARIA (DRIVER)) FARMERS INSURANCE DEFENDANTS ROMEO ALBANO AND SULIANA MANOA ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/17/12 TO DEFENDANT ROMEO ALBANO "UNKNOWN" ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-09-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, MARIA (DRIVER))
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-05-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL LAW FILED BY PARKS, MAURICE ORTEGA, MARIA (DRIVER)) FARMERS INSURANCE
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/17/12 TO DEFENDANT SULIANA MANO "UNKNOWN" ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ROMEO ALBANO, AND SULIANA MANOA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-17-2012 AT 1:30PM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *(FARMERS NAT'L DOCUMENT CTR.-AGENT FOR SERVICE)* FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKS, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE
